content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks can be fundamentally improved by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no additional training or supervised data while fixing its blind spot of single-perspective feedback bias. This hybrid framework leverages inconsistent self-generated problem-solving perspectives to surface uncaught flaws in initial outputs that single-pass self-feedback would miss.
